project_type: MQL5 Indicator for MetaTrader 5 (converted from TradingView Pine Script v6)
build_system: MetaTrader 5 compiler (not available in sandbox - use AST/syntax validation only)
test_framework: No automated tests - MT5 indicators are tested visually in MetaTrader terminal
build_command: N/A - MT5 compilation happens inside MetaTrader platform
test_command: N/A - manual testing in MT5 terminal
verification_instructions: Verify that the .mq5 file has valid MQL5 syntax, proper structure, all visual elements from Pine Script are preserved
setup_instructions: No setup needed - direct file creation
environment_constraints: Cannot compile MQL5 in sandbox. Cannot run MetaTrader. Validation is limited to syntax checks and code review. The file must be syntactically valid MQL5 that will compile in MetaEditor.
contribution_requirements: Write file to /projects/sandbox/Forex/STX_Edge.mq5, commit and push to GitHub main branch
key_patterns: Pine Script uses box.new(), line.new(), label.new() for visuals. MT5 uses ObjectCreate() with OBJ_RECTANGLE, OBJ_TREND, OBJ_LABEL. Pine Script types (tracked_box, laol_line_data, etc.) become MQL5 structs. Pine arrays become dynamic arrays or fixed arrays. request.security() becomes iOpen/iHigh/iLow/iClose/iTime on different timeframes.
directory_structure: Root contains STX Edge.txt (Pine Script source, 2293 lines) and STX_Edge.mq5 (output file). Other folders are unrelated trading education materials.
